announcements.title: First Sunday Breakfast
announcements.details: Join us for First Sunday Breakfast before worship. There will be no Sunday School on August 2.

announcements.details: Please bring peanut butter or boxed meals such as Hamburger Helper, Chicken Helper, or Tuna Helper.
